justification: All 6 rubric criteria met: (1) All 5 valid transitions from AC1 implemented, (2) InvalidTransitionError extends Error with code: 'INVALID_TRANSITION' property, (3) Both DELIVERED and CANCELLED are terminal with empty transition sets, (4) 24 tests cover all valid transitions plus invalid transitions (6 invalid + 5 CANCELLED + 5 DELIVERED), (5) AC6 SHIPPED->PENDING explicitly tested, (6) No external libraries — pure TypeScript with a static Record map.

observations.text: Terminal states enforced via empty sets in the transition map rather than special-case logic — elegant and less error-prone
InvalidTransitionError as a typed subclass with readonly code field is stronger than monkey-patching a plain Error
24 tests with dedicated describe blocks per AC — well beyond the minimum coverage requirement
All 6 ACs explicitly mapped in acceptance_criteria_coverage table
CONFIRMED -> CANCELLED path included (common miss per failure modes)
